task: Read the whole crate. Add a small end-to-end settings parser: expose `parse_setting(input: &str) -> Option<Setting>` where `Setting` has `key` and `value` strings. It should parse `name=value`, trim whitespace, reject empty keys, and pass the existing tests. Complete only after cargo test passes.
